title: System and method for active cancellation of magnetic fields in a passenger cabin of a vehicle
abstract: A vehicle, comprising: a frame; a passenger compartment including a selected region suitable for presence of people; an electric motor that, when in operation is associated with an undesired magnetic field emitted into the selected region; a magnetic field generator positioned in at least one of a passenger seat, a vehicle door, or the frame, wherein the magnetic field generator is configured to at least reduce the undesired magnetic field in the selected region; a magnetic field sensor configured for sensing the undesired magnetic field emitted into the selected region; and a circuit configured to: receive from the magnetic field sensor sensing data indicative of the undesired magnetic field; determine a cancelation magnetic field for at least reducing the undesired magnetic field; and direct electrical signals to the magnetic field generator for generating the cancelation magnetic field for at least reducing the undesired magnetic field.
claims: 1. A vehicle, comprising: a frame of the vehicle; a passenger compartment of the vehicle, including a selected region suitable for presence of people; at least one electric motor that, when in operation may be associated with an undesired magnetic field emitted into the selected region; at least one magnetic field generator positioned in at least one of a passenger seat, a vehicle door, or the frame of the vehicle, wherein the at least one magnetic field generator is configured to at least reduce the undesired magnetic field in the selected region; at least one magnetic field sensor configured for sensing the undesired magnetic field emitted into the selected region; and at least one circuit configured to: receive from the at least one magnetic field sensor sensing data indicative of the undesired magnetic field emitted into the selected region; determine a cancelation magnetic field for at least reducing the undesired magnetic field emitted by the electric motor into the selected region; and direct electrical signals to the at least one magnetic field generator positioned in at least one of the passenger seat, the vehicle door, or the frame of the vehicle for causing the at least one magnetic field generator to generate the cancelation magnetic field for at least reducing the undesired magnetic field emitted by the electric motor through the selected region.
